package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingBufferPoolWithoutMaxCapacity() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_buffer_pool_without_max_capacity"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Resource pooling. Flag buffer pools that return arbitrarily large buffers and retain memory after spikes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
